title: selaginella atimonanensis
intro: Selaginella atimonanensis, also known as Atimonan spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae, a type of non-vascular, vascular plant that grows in damp environments. Research has shown that Selaginella atimonanensis possesses medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella atimonanensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases, such as diabetes, cardiovascular diseases, and certain types of cancer, due to its ability to modulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella atimonanensis is typically used in traditional medicine to make infusions, decoctions, and tonics, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
